<!--
Thanks for the PR! Please fill the sections below.
Conventional Commits: type(scope): description — e.g. feat(ibanez): add F-prefix length branch
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A short summary. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New brand support
- [ ] New format for an existing brand
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / content
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling

## For brand / format changes

- [ ] At least two authoritative sources cited (inline in code and in the brand guide)
- [ ] Test cases added for every format claim
- [ ] Confidence tier assigned per match (`review` / `low` / `medium` / `high` / `hybrid` / `verified`)
- [ ] Guide page updated at `apps/web/src/content/brands/<brand>.mdx`

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything unusual, tradeoffs, or questions. -->
